steps.title: Simplify each term
steps.content:
• First term: $6xy \cdot 2x^2 = 12x^3y$ (multiply coefficients: $6 \cdot 2 = 12$, combine $x$ powers: $x \cdot x^2 = x^3$)
  • Second term: $6xy \cdot 5y = 30xy^2$ (multiply coefficients: $6 \cdot 5 = 30$, combine $y$ powers: $y \cdot y = y^2$)
$$12x^3y + 30xy^2$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
